Effective Date of Repeal, , , provided that:Pub. L. 104–331, § 5(b)110 Stat. 4072Oct. 26, 1996“This section [repealing this section and enacting provisions set out as a note below] shall take effect on .”October 1, 1997

L. 104–331, § 5(c)110 Stat. 4072Oct. 26, 1996“The repeal under this section [repealing this section] shall not affect proceedings under such section 303 in which a complaint was filed before the effective date of this section [], and orders shall be issued in such proceedings and appeals shall be taken therefrom as if this section had not been enacted.”Oct. 1, 1997
